meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of ProkaryotesSubcommittee on the taxonomy of Flavobacterium and Cytophaga-like bacteria
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 4. Minutes of the previous meetings.
The minutes of the previous meetings, which were held on 26 July 2005, San Francisco, CA, USA, had been approved by mail and published [Int J Syst Evol Microbiol 56 (2006), 2949–2951]. Reprints were distributed by J.-F. Bernardet to the members present.
